home.headline: Find a home, change a life
home.description: Discover pets ready for adoption, explore their stories and connect with families who have already taken the step. ADOPT-ME is designed to make adoption clear, warm and reliable.
home.storyText: Every profile tells a story and every adoption makes room for a new life. You can filter, explore and contact without getting lost.
home.newStoryTitle: Every adoption is a new story that starts today.
home.newStoryText: If you have already found your ideal companion, publish, share, or help others discover their next pet.
home.filterDescription: Select the pet type, size and location to only see what really matters to you.

login.heroText: Access your account or create a new one to manage adoptions, published pets and your profile within the community.
login.subtitleLogin: Access your profile to keep managing your animals and requests.
login.subtitleRegister: Fill in your details to open an account and activate your profile by email.

placeholders.description: Tell us a bit about you and the type of adoption you're looking for

errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

success.registerCreated: Account created. Check your email to activate it before logging in; if you don't see it, check spam.

geo.notSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
geo.fallbackText: The exact location name could not be obtained. The coordinates were saved.

contact.title: Send us a message
contact.messagePlaceholder: How can we help you today?
contact.confirmText: Review the details before sending it.
contact.errorText: There was a problem sending the message.

about.intro: We are Adopt-Me, a platform dedicated to connecting animals looking for a home with families ready to give them love. We believe every pet deserves a second chance, and every family deserves to find their perfect companion.
about.missionText: We believe there are no difficult animals, only stories that need to be heard. We facilitate transparent and safe adoptions to guarantee a future without cages.

values.compassionText: We understand the pain and hope of every living being that comes into our hands.
values.responsibilityText: We do not just hand over pets; we ensure the environment is ideal forever.
values.transparencyText: Every medical and behavioral story is shared without filters or doubts.

about.ctaText: Your new best friend is waiting for a chance. Start your adoption process today.

donate.heroTitle: Help them find a warm home
donate.heroSubtitle: Fill in the information clearly and publish an attractive listing for adoption.
donate.photosNote: Choose clear photos of the animal from different angles so it stands out better.

photos.defaultSummary: Select between 1 and 5 photos to publish
photos.minError: You must select at least {{min}} photos. Selected: {{selected}}
photos.maxError: You can select at most {{max}} photos. Selected: {{selected}}

donate.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us how it behaves, what it likes to do and its story...
donate.historyPlaceholder: Explain its context, how it came to you and why it is looking for adoption...
donate.submitNote: By publishing, you confirm that the information is real and you commit to a responsible adoption.

errors.ageRequired: Age must be a positive number

alerts.incompleteText: Please correct the errors in the form before publishing.
alerts.notLoggedText: You must log in to publish an animal
alerts.successText: The animal has been published correctly.

alerts.authLike: You must be logged in to like pets
alerts.ownRequest: You cannot send a request about one of your own animals.
alerts.ownerMissing: The owner of this animal was not found.
alerts.authContact: You must be logged in to contact.
alerts.ownConversation: You cannot start a conversation about one of your own animals.
alerts.openConversation: The conversation could not be opened.
alerts.authRequest: You must be logged in to send an adoption request.
alerts.ownAdoption: You cannot send an adoption request for one of your own animals.

profile.intro: Update your details to improve your community experience.
profile.aboutPlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself

errors.userId: Your user ID could not be found
errors.saveTitle: The profile could not be saved
errors.updateTitle: The profile could not be updated
errors.saveChanges: Error saving changes. Please try again.
errors.uploadPhoto: Error uploading the photo. Please try again.
errors.geoUnsupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
errors.geoFallback: The exact location name could not be obtained. The coordinates were saved.

myAnimals.title: My Publications
myAnimals.description: Manage your animal profiles and keep their information updated to improve adoption chances.

alerts.missingAnimal: The animal to delete could not be identified.
alerts.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this animal?
alerts.deleteError: The animal could not be deleted.

myRequests.title: My Adoption Requests
myRequests.subtitle: Manage all your adoption requests
myRequests.emptySent: You have not sent adoption requests yet
myRequests.emptySentHelp: Visit the animals page to send your first request
myRequests.emptyReceived: You have not received adoption requests yet
myRequests.emptyReceivedHelp: When someone requests to adopt one of your animals, it will appear here

alerts.rejectText: Do you want to reject this adoption request?
alerts.deleteText: Do you want to delete this adoption request?
alerts.acceptText: Do you want to accept this adoption request? You will not be able to undo this action. Remember to contact the adopter to coordinate the adoption.

favorites.title: My favorites
favorites.description: These are the animals you marked to review later.
favorites.emptyTitle: You do not have favorites yet
favorites.emptyText: When you mark animals as favorites, they will appear here so you can easily see them again.

alerts.removeError: The favorite could not be removed

messages.title: Conversations
messages.emptyText: When someone writes to you, it will appear here.
messages.startText: Write the first message to break the ice.
messages.selectText: Choose a chat on the left to view and reply to messages.

errors.loadConversation: The selected conversation could not be loaded.
errors.send: The message could not be sent.
errors.openProfile: The user profile could not be opened.

alerts.deleteRequestText: This request will be permanently deleted
alerts.requestDeleteError: There was an error deleting the request
alerts.deactivateText: This action will deactivate the user!
alerts.activateText: This action will activate the user!

donation.title: Make a donation
donation.description: Your donation helps animals find a home
donation.thanks: Thank you for your EUR {{amount}} donation!

errors.amount: The amount must be greater than 0

alerts.successText: Thank you for donating EUR {{amount}}! Your generosity will help many animals.
alerts.paymentStatus: Payment status: {{status}}. Please wait a moment.
alerts.processingText: Your payment is being processed. Please wait...

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.text: The page you are looking for does not exist or was moved.
